title: The 2024-07 mega-notebook — Asia trip + China prep + grad year + SimpleBaby capstone
html:
The 2024-07 mega-notebook — Asia trip + China prep + grad year + SimpleBaby capstone

Source: 2024-07-04 Apple Note, last modified 2025-05-26. The single longest running note in the apple-notes corpus (16.8KB) — almost a full year of life logistics from the start of the Asia summer trip through May 2025 graduation prep. The operational backbone of the China chapter and post-China re-entry.

TL;DR

  • Annapurna trek prep — exact day-by-day ABC route (Pokhara → Nayapul → Ghandruk → Chommrong → Dobhan → Deurali → ABC → Sinuwa → Bamboo) plus food costs and gear.
  • Religious-tradition cheat-sheet captured mid-trip: Christian — love thy neighbor / turn cheek; Islam — max effort full commit, devotion; Judaism — duty to provide for family; Hindu — life-as-illusion/game, marriage commitment.
  • China study-abroad logistics — dial-in for ECNU oral/written midterms, contact list of people to reach (Hamsa pay, Tesla giga factory, Shanghai Lawyer, Sean Michael Floyd, Dorian Dragon, Lachy Groom, Julien Bouteloup), CIEE payments, Shanghai sidequests.
  • Valeria visit planning — multi-night Shanghai hotels, train to Beijing, Forbidden City + Great Wall tickets, gift list (Dominic communist poster, Emilio Shanghai Sharks jersey).
  • Financial pickle (winter break 2024–25): $1914 owed to Jeff, $550 rent, $150 in account, hoping to juice $3000 from JCEF minus PCC classes, "Trump card is the insurance money" — same financial-cliff pattern that recurs in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by.
  • SimpleBaby capstone presentation script — full demo speaker notes for "BabyTracker" (database integration as the pain point). Direct successor to the 2021 child safety company fragment.
  • First explicit Brotein mentions in the apple-notes corpus: "finalize the figma design for the Brotien App", "-get Brotein to market****"*, "-finsih brotein".
  • App-idea seedbed: SwoleScan, Jack'd, Discord betting, Side quest app, Cheaper OFFHOURS robe, "selling to childless 40yo men", something with groq.
  • The Sam situation calls for police: "call the cops about the Sam situation" + "Print stalking order, Turn in stalking order" — the April breakup escalates into the March 2025 stalking order legal action.

Mid-doc thesis fragments

"Authenticity is the highest frequency"

"Thinking about what I'm gonna do after college I feel unemployable bc I refuse to stop at the upper bound. I'm to sporatric spontaneaous and would do more than an employee is expected to do that's my nature" — earliest articulation of the founder-not-employee identity that drives the Austin move.

"Set of heuristics to know when to jump ship and when to reconfigure and fix things" — a meta-framework he never (yet?) writes down.

"Self improvement is masterbstion. , now self destruction…" — late-2024 inflection.

Pattern observed

This is the densest junk-drawer note in the corpus — covers travel logistics, Chinese language drills, family obligations, business idea seeding, breakup aftermath, financial improv, capstone delivery, all in one running file. Spans the seam between the China chapter and the Austin move. The format IS Yahir's external working memory for the year.

Entities surfaced (people)

  • valeria (sister/cousin), Emilio (brother), dav (Alejandro?), Patricia, Ariel (Tesla connect), Mark (dinner), Lucy, Tang Lao Shi (teacher), ayden, Adam Brogden, Dominic, Yesenia, Frida, Andrew, Davis, Matt Ruff, kimiya, sam ("Sam situation"), Cam (Jipp)
  • Family: dad, mom (Roxanna/Roxane), Las Dobles As, Sebastian, Ann, Wayne, gramma Liz

Notable side-quest ideas (entities-in-waiting)

  • SwoleScan — a stealth app (Brotein-adjacent? body comp?)
  • Jack'd — another stealth app
  • OFFHOURS robe — clothing brand idea (cheaper version)
  • Discord betting — friend-bet app concept (peer-wager-app territory)
  • Selling to childless 40yo men — demographic-targeting thought
  • "Something with Groq, something underrated unearthed there" — the only Groq mention

Open questions

  • Did SimpleBaby ever ship? (Sounds like capstone-only deliverable per the demo script tone.)
  • Mongolia trip ever happened? (Mentioned aspirationally.)
  • Who is "Charles" (dinner)? "Liu Lao Shi" (teacher gift)?
  • The "Cathartic type jacket / off hours type robe / cheeky maozedong John cena shirt (Riley)" — fashion product line plan?

Related

  • china chapter
  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — the Asia trip itself
  • 2024 09 05 shanghai sidequests — Shanghai-specific extract
  • 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu — Chengdu extract
  • 2024 10 22 valeria visit — Valeria-specific extract
  • 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure — closing China reflection
  • 2025 05 30 todos — the natural successor running list
  • brotein
  • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script — the Sam thread
  • 2025 03 12 stalking packet — the Sam thread escalation
  • — the format itself
  • ciee
  • cam jipp pre rankett idea — the "Diddles/Jipp idea" workshop has its earliest traces in this notebook (lines 210, 374)
